title: notholaena greggii
intro: Notholaena greggii, also known as the Greggii fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Notholaena greggii can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
